title: ImagePullPolicy Unexpected Responses
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

I'm trying to deploy both my containers (apache and its prometheus exporter) as a pod still.
You can see it here: https://github.com/rhdojun/simpleserver/blob/master/pod-simpleserver.yaml
The image that contains the httpd is locally built https://github.com/rhdojun/simpleserver/blob/master/Dockerfile
(Podman version is self-built from master yesterday)

And I don't run a local registry. So I manually configure an imagePullPolicy to either IfNotPresent or Never. But it doesn't work as I expect it to. And I also check for possible spelling errors in the image name (with the echo && echo && diff line).

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. check description

2. reproduce the following terminal copy&paste

```
11:35:58:simpleserver🍔  podman image ls |grep simpleserver
localhost/simpleserver                     latest       40af9b255611  18 hours ago   262 MB
11:36:08:simpleserver🍔  podman play kube pod-simpleserver.yaml
Trying to pull docker.io/bitnami/apache-exporter:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 74085f8faf67 skipped: already exists  
Copying blob b4734b8f18fd skipped: already exists  
Copying blob b0b7c3fba865 skipped: already exists  
Copying blob 2ab951a41795 skipped: already exists  
Copying blob fc786db97c87 [--------------------------------------] 0.0b / 0.0b
Copying blob 522a7372a4ae [--------------------------------------] 0.0b / 0.0b
Copying blob aae0198f3018 [--------------------------------------] 0.0b / 0.0b
Copying config ed841490bf done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
Trying to pull localhost/simpleserver:latest...
  Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:443: connect: connection refused
Error: unable to pull localhost/simpleserver:latest: Error initializing source docker://localhost/simpleserver:latest: error pinging docker registry localhost: Get "https://localhost/v2/": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:443: connect: connection refused
11:36:25:simpleserver🍔  echo "localhost/simpleserver" >/tmp/image-has && echo "localhost/simpleserver" >/tmp/image-want && diff -u /tmp/image-has /tmp/image-want
11:37:27:simpleserver🍔  
[...]
11:41:49:simpleserver🍔  sed -i 's/imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent/imagePullPolicy: Never/g' pod-simpleserver.yaml 
11:41:59:simpleserver🍔  vim pod-simpleserver.yaml 
11:42:10:simpleserver🍔  podman play kube pod-simpleserver.yaml
Error: error adding pod to state: name "simpleserver_pod" is in use: pod already exists
11:42:14:simpleserver🍔  podman pod rm simpleserver_pod && podman rm -a
dc031eeb4a6e2cb7612ba1624986157f9d1779117746d8cfb8766beefdd246bd
11:42:18:simpleserver🍔  podman play kube pod-simpleserver.yaml
Trying to pull docker.io/bitnami/apache-exporter:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 74085f8faf67 skipped: already exists  
Copying blob 2ab951a41795 skipped: already exists  
Copying blob 522a7372a4ae skipped: already exists  
Copying blob b4734b8f18fd skipped: already exists  
Copying blob fc786db97c87 skipped: already exists  
Copying blob aae0198f3018 skipped: already exists  
Copying blob b0b7c3fba865 [--------------------------------------] 0.0b / 0.0b
Copying config ed841490bf done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
Error: invalid pull type "Never"
11:42:24:simpleserver🍔  
```

**Describe the results you received:**

In both versions of ImagePullPolicy (`Never`, `IfNotPresent`) I could not achieve that it actually uses the locally built and cached image.

**Describe the results you expected:**

It uses the image I just built.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

If I run not with kube play but with normal pod and container creation commands it works:
https://github.com/rhdojun/simpleserver/commit/c7dd30409914a596aecba3cc6b5d54ffa9f5ced1

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      2.1.0-dev
API Version:  1
Go Version:   go1.14.6
Built:        Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970    # locally built from master branch one day before creation of this issue
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
this won't help since I built it myself yesterday
```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

RHEL8CSB

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@rhdojun  In kube, if the image is tagged with latest, it will always pull, try just `image: localhost/simpleserver` can use just the local image.
